name: Robert Heitman
title: Founder & Chief Executive Officer
bio: Visionary real estate pioneer with 35 years transforming commercial real estate portfolios. Founded Landmark in 1989 and has guided the firm to become a preeminent global property advisor managing $47B in real estate assets across 10 continents.

name: Elizabeth Ashford
title: Chief Investment Officer
bio: Leads all investment strategy across commercial, retail, and industrial properties. 27 years of real estate expertise with proven track record of identifying undervalued assets and executing value-add repositioning strategies.

name: Michael Chen
title: Head of Private Equity Real Estate
bio: Directs private equity fund complex with $18.5B AUM focused on acquisition and development of premium properties. 19 years closing large-scale transactions with average IRR of 14.2% across fund portfolio.

name: Catherine Morrison
title: Senior Managing Director - Asset Management
bio: Oversees active asset management of 847 properties globally. Expert in lease negotiations, capital planning, and operational efficiency with focus on maximizing investor returns.

name: James Whitmore
title: Head of Private Debt Strategies
bio: Manages $16.2B in private lending platforms providing construction and long-term financing. Specialist in complex real estate credit structures with 22 years of underwriting expertise.

name: Priya Kapoor
title: Director of Research & Analytics
bio: Leads market research team analyzing global real estate trends and investment opportunities. Proprietary analytics platform tracks 50,000+ properties across major markets providing institutional investors with actionable insights.

name: David Richardson
title: Managing Director - Sustainability & ESG
bio: Champions environmental, social, and governance initiatives across Landmark portfolio. 16 years leading green building certification and sustainable property initiatives, achieving 35% carbon reduction across holdings.

name: Maria Gonzalez
title: Senior Portfolio Manager - Retail Properties
bio: Specializes in retail real estate portfolio management across 150+ shopping centers and retail destinations. Expertise in omnichannel retail strategies and adaptive real estate repositioning for evolving consumer behaviors.

name: Thomas Bergström
title: Managing Director - Industrial & Logistics
bio: Directs industrial and logistics real estate strategy with focus on supply chain infrastructure. Engineered portfolio of 280+ facilities generating consistent 6.8% yields through long-term tenant relationships.

name: Yuki Tanaka
title: Head of International Expansion
bio: Leads global market entry strategy across emerging and developed markets. Successfully established Landmark operations in 18 countries with local partnerships and regional expertise in real estate fundamentals.

name: Sarah Mitchell
title: Managing Director - Office Properties
bio: Manages premium office portfolio across major metropolitan centers with focus on adaptable workspace solutions. Leading adaptation of office properties for post-pandemic tenant requirements and flexible work environments.

name: Andreas Hoffmann
title: Chief Financial Officer
bio: Manages financial operations, investor relations, and capital deployment strategies. 25 years in real estate finance with expertise in complex capital structures and investor reporting frameworks.
